Definition: An ester of phthalic acid. It appears as a light-colored, odorless liquid and is used as a plasticizer for many resins and elastomers.

CTDCuratedSynonyms: Mono-2-ethyhexyl phthalate|mono(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate|mono-2-ethylhexyl phthalate|Mono-(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate|mono-ethylhexyl phthalate
